file_name: SightLife Surgical, Inc. - STRATEGIC SALES _ MARKETING AGREEMENT.txt

perturbation.original_text: Surgical will provide sales representation services to Imprimis during the Term of this Agreement (Surgical and its sales representatives may be referred to collectively hereinafter as Surgical). The sales representation services ("Services") are set forth in the Statement of Work ("SOW") that is attached hereto as Appendix A and made a part hereof, as it may be amended from time to time by the parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: Surgical will provide sales representation services to Imprimis during the Term of this Agreement. The sales representation services ("Tasks") are set forth in the Statement of Work ("SOW") that is attached hereto as Appendix A and made a part hereof, as it may be amended from time to time by the parties hereto.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Services' is changed to 'Tasks' in the definition, but the contract continues to use 'Services' elsewhere. This creates confusion as to whether the obligations outlined in the SOW are 'Services' or 'Tasks,' particularly regarding payment and deliverables. This change contradicts section 3 where it refers to Services for payments.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In consideration of the Services provided hereunder, Imprimis shall pay Surgical sales commissions ("Sales Commissions") as set forth in the SOW. Surgical shall be responsible for all expenses incurred in association with performance of the Services.
perturbation.justification: The original text defines sales representation services as 'Services', and the contradicted text outlines payment terms based on these 'Services'. The changed text redefines 'Services' as 'Tasks'. This creates a direct conflict because the contract now uses two different terms ('Services' and 'Tasks') to refer to the same set of obligations, causing ambiguity regarding payment obligations. This ambiguity directly impacts the enforceability of the payment terms outlined in the contradicted text, as it is unclear whether payments are tied to 'Services' or 'Tasks'. This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: The Sales Team shall use only such marketing and other materials for the Product in the Territory as are expressly approved in writing in advance by Imprimis, are consistent in all respects with the external marketing of such Product by Imprimis, include all warnings and instructions applicable for the proper use of the Product, comply with all applicable laws and regulations in the Territory, and do not contain any claims regarding a Product or its performance that the Sales Team does not reasonably demonstrate are supported by such Product or its performance.
perturbation.changed_text: The Sales Representatives shall use only such marketing and other materials for the Product in the Territory as are expressly approved in writing in advance by Imprimis, are consistent in all respects with the external marketing of such Product by Imprimis, include all warnings and instructions applicable for the proper use of the Product, comply with all applicable laws and regulations in the Territory, and do not contain any claims regarding a Product or its performance that the Sales Representatives does not reasonably demonstrate are supported by such Product or its performance.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Sales Team' is changed to 'Sales Representatives'. It’s unclear whether "Sales Team" and "Sales Representatives" refer to the same group of people within Surgical, leading to confusion on who is binded by the terms of the Agreement. It contradicts with the original reference of 'Sales Team' in the preceding section (Surgical will provide a dedicated sales staff of four (4) Surgical employees (the "Sales Team") in the provision of the Services.). It is not clear if they are one in the same.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Providing a dedicated sales staff of four (4) Surgical employees (the "Sales Team") in the provision of the Services. The Sales Team shall have specific and sufficient related ophthalmic experience and relationships with potential purchasers of the Product to adequately provide the Services.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Sales Team' to 'Sales Representatives' creates a strong in-text contradiction. The original text explicitly defines 'Sales Team' as 'a dedicated sales staff of four (4) Surgical employees'. By changing 'Sales Team' to 'Sales Representatives' in the modified text, it introduces ambiguity as to whether 'Sales Representatives' refers to the same, specifically defined group. This ambiguity directly conflicts with the contradicted text, which relies on the clear definition of 'Sales Team' to establish obligations and responsibilities related to their ophthalmic experience and relationships, and therefore introduces Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction

perturbation.original_text: The Sales Team shall have the right to use copies of marketing materials provided by Imprimis to the Sales Team hereunder to the extent reasonably necessary to perform its obligations under this Agreement and subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. If Imprimis reasonably believes that any marketing materials or strategies used by the Sales Team for the Product in the Territory fail to fully comply with the terms and conditions of this Agreement or any applicable law, Imprimis shall give written notice thereof and the Sales Team immediately shall cease to use such non-compliant materials.
perturbation.changed_text: The Sales Force shall have the right to use copies of marketing materials provided by Imprimis to the Sales Team hereunder to the extent reasonably necessary to perform its obligations under this Agreement and subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. If Imprimis reasonably believes that any marketing materials or strategies used by the Sales Force for the Product in the Territory fail to fully comply with the terms and conditions of this Agreement or any applicable law, Imprimis shall give written notice thereof and the Sales Representatives immediately shall cease to use such non-compliant materials.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Sales Team' is changed to 'Sales Force' while 'Sales Team' is still in the text. This inconsistency introduces uncertainty on which group of people, or if any, is binded to the original contractual term. The term 'Sales Team' is still being referred to, as it contradict with 'Sales Representatives' in the same paragraph.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Sales Force shall have the right to use copies of marketing materials provided by Imprimis to the Sales Team hereunder to the extent reasonably necessary to perform its obligations under this Agreement and subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. If Imprimis reasonably believes that any marketing materials or strategies used by the Sales Force for the Product in the Territory fail to fully comply with the terms and conditions of this Agreement or any applicable law, Imprimis shall give written notice thereof and the Sales Representatives immediately shall cease to use such non-compliant materials.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Sales Team' with 'Sales Force' and 'Sales Representatives' within the same paragraph, while still referring to 'Sales Team' in another part of the same text. This introduces ambiguity and contradicts the original intended meaning, creating uncertainty about which group ('Sales Team', 'Sales Force', or 'Sales Representatives') is bound by the agreement's terms, fulfilling the conditions for Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction.
